displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #23: The Catastrophe Con, Part IV
synopsis: GOOD NEWS: THE IMPERIALS HAVE ABANDONED ACCRESKER JAIL. BAD NEWS: FIRST THEY SHOT IT AT A REBEL PLANET. For unscrupulous inmate DOCTOR APHRA, accompanied by former flame SANA STARROS and current flame INSPECTOR TOLVAN…(NB: Awkward.)…chances to escape are dwindling fast. Good thing Aphra's not distracted by an expensive relic, right? Oh, dear.
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #23: The Catastrophe Con, Part IV
